m=null;switch(v){case"Numeric":m=ua(S);break;case"Alphanumeric":m=pa(S);break;case"Byte":m=fa(S);break;case"Kanji":m=ha(S);break;default:throw"mode:"+v}E.push(m),f=null},d.isDark=function(S,v){if(S<0||l<=S||v<0||l<=v)throw ${d.size.toLocaleString()} BYTES \xB7 ${d.type||"UNKNOWN TYPE"}`:"NO FILE SELECTED"},s("%23runHash").onclick=async()=>{let Promise.all(u.map(T=>ia(h,T)));n.hashes=Object.fromEntries(u.map((T,c)=>[T,A[c]])),I(s("%23hashResults"),u.map((T,c)=>`<div><div class="developer-result-head"><b>${T}</b><button data-copy-hash="${c}">COPY</button></div><div class="output ${h.message}`}finally{d.disabled=!1,d.textContent="GENERATE HASHES"}},s("%23decodeJwt").onclick=()=>{try{let d=s("%23jwtInput").value.trim().split(".");if(d.length!==3||!d[0]||!d[1])throw new Error("A window.render_developer_tools_to_text})}function ln(a){let e=null,t=null,n=80,i=()=>{let h=bt();if(!h)return{available:!1,error:"NO OPENER \u2014 launch from the bookmarklet to inspect a He(a,e="auto"){let t=e==="tab"?"	":e==="comma"?",":a.split(/\r?\n/,1)[0]?.includes("	")?" d=a[E],g=a[E+1];o?d==='"'&&g==='"'?(i+='"',E++):d==='"'?o=!1:i+=d:d==='"'?o=!0:d===t?(n[n.length-1].push(i),i=""):d===`%0A`?(n[n.length-1].push(i),i="",n.push([])):d!=="\r"&&(i+=d)}o&&r.push("Unclosed quoted value"),n[n.length-1].push(i);let l=n.filter((E,d)=>d<n.length-1||E.some(g=>g.trim())),f=Math.max(0,...l.map(E=>E.length));return l.forEach((E,d)=>{E.length!==f&&r.push(`Row ${d+1} has CONTENT</div>'}function dn(a){I(a,j("FILE TOOLS","Offline local-file inspection, conversion, preview, and checksums.",`<div class="file-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="File signal","arcade:score-500":"500 point surge","arcade:board-save":"Board game preserved","arcade:resume":"Back in the match","arcade:gamepad-seen":"Controller detected","chess:first-win":"Chess En(){return{game:"arcade-stats",scores:k.data.scores,achievements:Object.keys(k.data.achievements),savedGames:Object.fromEntries(["chess","checkers"].map(a=>[a,!!k.data.savedGames[a]])),sound:!!k.data.settings.sound}}function adjust digital-rain brightness and speed; switch between comfortable and compact layouts; and arrange favorite modules at the top of navigation and Quick Launch.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Browser limitations</h3><p class="muted">Chrome blocks bookmarklets on protected pages including <code>chrome://</code>, the New Tab page, extension pages, and the Chrome Web Store. On ordinary sites, the dashboard opens in a separate resizable popup window.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Privacy</h3><p class="muted">Only the optional USD/INR updater contacts the fixed Frankfurter exchange-rate endpoint. All other tools load no external assets and use no analytics or accounts.
